nodes.summary: Read versions.sh from baseline and target refs via local git operations
Parse and classify pin variables as unchanged/changed/new/removed
Scan consumer bootstrap templates for changed/new variable name references
Emit version_pin_diff.json with all classification results and template references
Non-blocking error isolation: log error, emit error artifact, exit zero
Invoke version pin diff in pipeline between Stage 1 and Stage 2 with || true guard
Residual report includes Version Pin Changes section from version_pin_diff.json
Residual report states no-changes message when all pin categories are empty
Each changed pin entry in residual report includes prescribed infra-bootstrap sync action
Upgrade skill runbook documents version pin diff section and post-pipeline operator workflow
Script completes within 10 seconds using only local git operations
No secrets written to artifact or logs; versions.sh contains only version strings
Log each stage via pipeline log_info/log_warning/log_error conventions
Pipeline continues when artifact absent or malformed; residual report emits manual fallback
Standalone CLI invocation without running full pipeline
Changed TERRAFORM_VERSION with template reference appears in residual report with prescribed action
Zero pin changes produces no-changes message in residual report
New pin variable appears in New Pins subsection with value and template references
Removed pin variable appears in Removed Pins subsection with old value
Git error path: pipeline continues, residual report contains error message and fallback command
Unit test: fixture versions.sh pair produces correct changed/new/removed lists and template_references
